email_subject: Application for Billing Support - English - International Market
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Billing Support position at Michael Page International (Belgium). With a strong attention to detail, organizational skills, and proficiency in MS Excel, I am confident in my ability to assist in invoice processing, resolve billing discrepancies, and support month-end closing activities.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple tasks simultaneously, ensuring accuracy and timely delivery. I have developed a keen eye for detail through technical SEO audits and data analysis using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. My background in front-end development has also honed my problem-solving abilities and comfort with financial software.

I am eager to bring my analytical mindset and communication skills to your team in the life science sector. I am available to start as soon as possible.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your organization.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Billing Support - English - International Market position at Michael Page International (Belgium). With a strong foundation in detail-oriented tasks, data analysis, and process improvement, I am well-prepared to contribute to your client's finance team in the life science sector.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, content creation, and website maintenance for multiple clients. This requires meticulous attention to detail, organization, and the ability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment. I regularly use Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Excel to track performance and identify areas for improvement—skills directly transferable to billing support, where accuracy and data reconciliation are key.

Previously, as a Front-End Developer at ViviDoctor, I developed features for a healthcare web application, honing my problem-solving abilities and familiarity with structured data. My experience in warehouse logistics at Katoen Natie further strengthened my ability to work efficiently under pressure while maintaining accuracy.

I am proficient in MS Office, particularly Excel, and comfortable learning new software quickly. My educational background includes coursework in Applied Computer Science, which has given me a logical approach to problem-solving. I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving.

I am drawn to this opportunity because it combines my strengths in detail-oriented work and process improvement within a collaborative environment. I am eager to apply my skills to billing operations and contribute to the company's high standards.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can support your team.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Proficient in MS Office, particularly Excel, for data analysis and reporting.
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills demonstrated through SEO audits and content management.
Experience in fast-paced environments requiring accuracy and efficiency (warehouse logistics).
Problem-solving abilities developed through front-end development and technical SEO.
Excellent communication skills in English, with experience responding to client inquiries.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Detail-oriented professional with a technical background and strong organizational skills, seeking to transition into billing support. Experienced in data analysis, process improvement, and maintaining accuracy in fast-paced environments. Proficient in MS Office, particularly Excel, and comfortable with financial software. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- MS Office, especially Excel (data analysis, reporting)
- Attention to detail and organizational skills
- Problem-solving and process improvement
- Data analysis and reporting (Google Analytics, SEMrush)
- Communication and client inquiry handling
- Fast-paced environment adaptability
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
